title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Mahindra Logistics family as a Logistics Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!
